title: At Least 4 Killed in Iranian Strike in Haifa, Israeli Officials Say
summary_full: Rescue workers recovered four bodies from a residential building in the port city of Haifa after air defenses failed to intercept an Iranian strike, Israeli officials said.
summary_public: Rescue workers recovered four bodies from a residential building in the port city of Haifa after air defenses failed to intercept an Iranian strike, Israeli officials said.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iranian Strike in Haifa, Israeli Officials Say
